outcome: Audit packaging, privacy, and release readiness without modifying files.
verification: Report concrete findings with file evidence
Verify no personal paths or credentials are present
Write the required three-file artifact contract
iterationPolicy: Inspect once, then verify every reported finding against a file.
stopWhen: All public-release surfaces have been checked and a structured result is written.
pauseIf: A destructive action, credential, or external publication would be required.
